listings.title: Wollensak T-1515 reel to reel tape recorder
listings.body: One of the first was the T-1515, a Stereo version. The 1515 replaced the standard mono head with a stereo head and added a small preamplifier for the second channel. By plugging the unit into a stereo system or adding a satellite speaker/amplifier the then-new Stereo tapes could be played. Recording was still only mono,

listings.title: Hallicrafters S-38 shortwave ham radio
listings.body: Hallicrafters S-38 is a legendary vintage shortwave radio produced from 1946 to 1961. Famous for its Art Deco design by Raymond Loewy and an affordable $47.50 launch price, this 6-tube (later 5-tube) superheterodyne receiver was many people's introduction to listening to the world.

listings.body: Fujifilm GFX 50R — Medium Format Camera 📷 51.4 Megapixel medium format sensor 🖤 Color: Black 🔢 Shutter count: Only 7,500 — extremely low! 🔋 Includes 4 lithium-ion batteries + charger This is a top-of-the-line medium format camera from Fujifilm's GFX Series. Built for demanding shooting conditions, it delivers exceptional image quality and outstanding reliability. Perfect for photographers who value precision and quality. Serious inquiries only. Feel free to message with any questions!

listings.title: Vintage Bartlett Collins Juice Tumblers marked Hollywood, Fla
listings.body: Set of 6 vintage Bartlett-Collins juice size tumblers. All 6 gold rimmed; 3 painted with pink flamingos; and 3 with palm trees. All glasses marked Hollywood, Fla. Come in original box. All glasses/tumblers in like new condition. Box is in fair condition with a hand drawing on the bottom. Glasses are 3 3/4” tall. $50 Cash only. Pick up only.

listings.title: 1oz Silver Round Bullion
listings.body: Im selling some of my 1oz Silver rounds that are 999 pure silver. I have a various designs and mints. Willing to sell some at the spot price of silver. Others i have would be a few dollars above. If interested lets work out a deal.

listings.title: Dog Guitar
listings.body: For a kid's guitar,  this has pretty cool sounds (accoustic, electric, howl). You will need your own batteries though. There are a few markings on the guitar. Not sure what they are, but the whole guitar has been wiped with sanitizing wipes.

listings.title: Paw Patrol Marshall
listings.body: Marshall is all washed and from a pet and smoke free home. This stuffed animal is ready to be played with. Measures about 8 inches tall.

listings.title: Play Camping Cookware
listings.body: This set bundles up and fits most of it in the mess kit. Opens up to a pan, bowl,etc. Pretend flame and sound when you turn the knob.

listings.title: Monster Truck
listings.body: Probably makes as much noise as a real monster truck.  Just press any of the four buttons on top. The arrows move the truck forward and backwards. About 10 inches long.

listings.title: PAC man one up video game
listings.body: Selling a Pac-Man one up console hsed no more than 5 times. Brand new. $300 firm. Included manual and Pac-Man stool.
